---
title: "NestedLMEResult"
generated: true
description: "Nested two-level mixed-model fit output (the [`lme_fit`](../nitrix-stats-lme-reml/lme_fit.qmd) R3 path)."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.stats.lme.reml`](../nitrix-stats-lme-reml.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:NestedLMEResult -->
```python
class NestedLMEResult
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:NestedLMEResult -->
Nested two-level mixed-model fit output (the [`lme_fit`](../nitrix-stats-lme-reml/lme_fit.qmd) R3 path).
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

### Methods

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:NestedLMEResult.__init__ -->
```python
__init__(beta_hat: Float[Array, 'V p'], var_outer: Float[Array, 'V'], var_inner: Float[Array, 'V'], sigma_e_sq: Float[Array, 'V'], log_lik: Float[Array, 'V'], tier: str) -> None
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:NestedLMEResult -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `V` | elements of a mass-univariate map — voxels, vertices, or fixels |
| `p` | fixed-effect coefficients / design-matrix columns |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
